rationale: Elec. Code §271.013 governs compensation of election officers at common polling places in joint elections. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Except as provided by this section, compensation for election officers serving at a common polling place in a joint election is the same as that paid to election officers serving at a regular polling place.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns election officer compensation, unrelated to homestead exemption.
